---
title: Geospatial Analytics and Applications Coursework

---

Welcome to **Geospatial Analytics and Application (ISSS626)**. This website collects my submission of coursework. Use the top navigation bar to open each page.

::: callout-note
### How to use this site

-   **Home** (this page): Overview, quick links, and status.
-   **About**: Short profile of the student.
-   **Hands-on Exercise** (menu): Open individual hands-on assignments.
-   **In-Class Exercise** (menu): Open individual in-class assignments
-   **Take-home Exercise** (menu): Open individual take-home assignments
:::

## Quick Links -- Recent Submissions

(Refer to the drop-down menus above for complete list of assignment submissions)

-   👉 **Hand-on Exercise 6**: [Open the assignment](Hands-on_Ex06/hand-on_ex06)
-   👉 **In-Class Exercise 5**: [Open the assignment](in-class_ex05/in-class_ex05)
-   👉 **Hand-on Exercise 5b**: [Open the assignment](Hands-on_Ex05/hand-on_ex05b)
-   👉 **Hand-on Exercise 5a**: [Open the assignment](Hands-on_Ex05/hand-on_ex05a)
-   👉 **Take-home Exercise 1**: [Open the assignment](Take-home_Ex01/take-home_ex01)



## Objectives:

1.  Demonstrate step-by-step workflows for geospatial tasks that a beginner can follow.
2.  Use clear, descriptive names and relative file paths so the website renders correctly on Netlify.
3.  Provide reproducible results with the same structure for every assignment.
